title: at-spi2-core bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
* Thu Apr 03 2025 Lukas Tyrychtr <ltyrycht@redhat.com>
- Update to at-spi2-core 2.56.1 so we have the a11y keyboard monitor support
  Resolves: 83403
full_text:
* Thu Apr 03 2025 Lukas Tyrychtr <ltyrycht@redhat.com>
- Update to at-spi2-core 2.56.1 so we have the a11y keyboard monitor support
  Resolves: 83403
